transcription.text: Your dog is bored, trapped inside because of your weed killer. But now, there's Spruce, the pet-friendly weed and grass killer. Spruce works differently by dehydrating to the roots for dead weeds in just one day. So go ahead, let the dogs out with Spruce, pet-friendly, weed deadly.
